name: Market Analysis
description: Deep-dive market analysis: research the market, identify customer personas, analyze competitors, and surface positioning opportunities.
goal_template: Analyze the {sector} market for business opportunities

steps.name: Market Research
steps.description: TAM/SAM/SOM sizing, problem identification, trend detection

steps.name: Customer Persona
steps.description: Build ideal customer profile with pain points and motivations

steps.name: Competitive Analysis
steps.description: Map competitor landscape, identify gaps and advantages

steps.name: Market Positioning
steps.description: Define category, unique attributes, and positioning statement
